---
title: "Environment Setup Check"
format: html
jupyter: python3
---

## ライブラリのインポートと版数確認

```{python}
import sys
import polars as pl
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import torch

print(f"Python: {sys.version.split()[0]}")
print(f"polars: {pl.__version__}")
print(f"pandas: {pd.__version__}")
print(f"numpy:  {np.__version__}")
print(f"torch:  {torch.__version__}")
print(f"CUDA:   {torch.cuda.is_available()}")
print(f"MPS:    {torch.backends.mps.is_available()}")
```

## DataFrame表示の確認 (Data Explorerで開けるか)

```{python}
df = pl.DataFrame({
    "user_id": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "question_id": [101, 102, 101, 103, 102],
    "correct": [1, 0, 1, 1, 0],
    "elapsed_ms": [1200, 3400, 900, 5600, 2100],
})
df
```
